articles.title: Inflation target held at 4% for next five years

The framework, set for another five years until March 2031, obligates the RBI to manage monetary policy for price control. This move influences government fiscal measures, aiming for overall economic stability.

articles.description: A new bill aims to speed up bankruptcy resolution in India. Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman introduced amendments to the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code. The bill also addresses cross-border and corporate group insolvency cases.

dailyNews.title: Zelensky says US security guarantees for Ukraine conditional on Donbas withdrawal, warns move would compromise European

dailyNews.title: For 2nd Time, an Appeals Court Backs the Trump Administration’s Detention Policy
dailyNews.description: Courts are weighing whether the administration can hold undocumented immigrants without bond, an issue that may be resolved by the Supreme Court.

dailyNews.title: Matt Brittin, Former Google Executive, Named the New BBC Head

dailyNews.title: Trump voted by mail in Florida despite calling mail-in voting "cheating"
dailyNews.description: President Trump has long railed against mail-in voting, but used the method this month in a Florida election, public records indicate.

dailyNews.title: Appeals court lets Trump administration hold many immigration detainees without bond
dailyNews.description: A panel of appeals court judges handed the Trump administration a major legal victory in its quest to detain large swaths of immigrants living in the country illegally without bond.

dailyNews.title: White House turns down Elon Musk's offer to pay TSA workers during DHS shutdown
dailyNews.description: In a post on X Saturday, Musk offered to pay the salaries of TSA workers during the DHS shutdown.

dailyNews.title: White House rejects Elon Musk's offer to pay TSA workers
dailyNews.description: CBS News has learned that the White House turned down Elon Musk's offer to pay TSA workers during the Homeland Security shutdown. CBS News White House reporter Olivia Rinaldi has the latest.

dailyNews.title: Watch: Humanoid robot walks alongside first lady Melania Trump at White House
dailyNews.description: Melania Trump hosted an AI-powered humanoid robot at the White House on Wednesday as part of a children's technology summit. The first lady delivered remarks on her mission "to empower children through technology and education."
